hooks.command: cd /home/user/FF-DA; test -d apps/draft-assistant/frontend/node_modules || exit 0; pnpm --filter @ff/draft-assistant-frontend run fmt 2>&1; pnpm --filter @ff/draft-assistant-frontend run lint:fix 2>&1; git add -u apps/draft-assistant/frontend/; pnpm --filter @ff/draft-assistant-frontend run fmt:check 2>&1 && pnpm --filter @ff/draft-assistant-frontend run lint 2>&1
